name: Rewarding Better Thinking for LLM Preference Alignment
summary: arXiv:2607.19824v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM preference alignment aims to optimize models toward human preferences across diverse user instructions. Reinforcement learning has become a major...
description: arXiv:2607.19824v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: LLM preference alignment aims to optimize models toward human preferences across diverse user instructions. Reinforcement learning has become a major post-training approach for this goal, but existing proxy rewards are often outcome-level, mainly evaluating the final response while providing limited guidance for the reasoning trajectory. This can...
author: Xubo Liu, Wenya Guo, Ruxue Yan, Xinying Qian, Ying Zhang
